stemHtml: An update in the geographical coordinates of an aerodrome has been made in the AIP. In accordance with ICAO Annex 15, this permanent change should be published as...

options.a: an AIP Amendment and be made available by the most expeditious means.
options.b: an AIP Supplement and be made available when possible.
options.c: an AIP Supplement and be made available by the most expeditious means.
options.d: a NOTAM and be made available when possible.
